summary: Parallel review: FAIL (2 critical, 1 warning, 3 suggestion). Compound gate: PASS

findingsList.text: **Verdict: PASS** — `"simplicity"` is registered in `bin/lib/flows.mjs:170` (`PARALLEL_REVIEW_ROLES`).
